data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft's platform leverages a global network of data centers and cloud services for scalability.
data.technical_spec: Azure cloud services, IaaS/PaaS, global data centers.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Divides applications into smaller, independent services to enhance deployment and development speed.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Uses Content Delivery Networks to improve response times and handle traffic efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Edge servers, caching strategies, global presence.

data.title: Event-Driven Design
data.description: Employs event-driven architecture for real-time data processing and applications.
data.technical_spec: Event brokers, stream processing, messaging queues.

data.title: Service-Oriented Architecture
data.description: Emphasizes service interfaces that loosely couple services in a networked environment.
data.technical_spec: SOAP/RESTful APIs, SOA governance, XML standards.
